issues.title: AI-DEV repo-only validator update
issues.body:
Implement a repo-only validator fixture update.

Safety:
- Must NOT call external AI / Gemini / OpenAI runtime.
- Must NOT send LINE / Email / notifications.
- Must NOT place trades / call broker APIs.
- Must NOT write production DB.
- Must NOT run production pipeline.
- Must NOT modify cron / systemd / timers.
- Do not run python3 main.py in production mode.
- 禁止讀取 secrets、tokens、credentials 或 .env。
- 不得修改 n8n、production DB、cron、systemd、timer。

Deliverables:
- Update templates/github_issue_mobile_auto_pickup_negated_safety_fixture.example.json.
- Run validation helper only.
